title: The Crew Enters the Legend
description: On pages 26–29, the crew enters the legend focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 26–29, the crew enters the legend focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why did you help him escape!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What reason do you have for preventing a man from setting sail?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hurry up! This rope won't hold for much longer!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hurry up and get on board! We're setting sail immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forgive us, sir! Because of that sudden gust, the buggy Pirates have managed to esca...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I'm continuing my pursuit for straw hat. Take out our ship.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll go to grand line as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't forgive that Roronoa Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I swear I'll bring him down with my own two hands!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: But sir! this town is under your jurisdiction...! What will the higher-ups say if they hear you ABA...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I still have to settle things with that rubber brat.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: So we might as well as go right in.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: O' How long I've missed you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yahoo! The ship feels like it'll flip right over!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You see that light over there?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: It's known as the "light of guidance."

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: the entrance to the grand line,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: is just up ahead of that light.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: D-don't you guys think that entering grand line in the midst of this a storm is a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So we've reached grand line, have we? Well this calls for a celebration!

summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
